recommendations.title: One-Eyed Jacks
recommendations.overview: Running from the law after a bank robbery in Mexico, Dad Longworth finds an opportunity to take the stolen gold and leave his partner Rio to be captured. Years later, Rio escapes from the prison where he has been since, and hunts down Dad for revenge

recommendations.title: My Name Is Vendetta
recommendations.overview: After old enemies kill his family, a former mafia enforcer and his feisty daughter flee to Milan, where they hide out while plotting their revenge.

recommendations.title: Terminal Velocity
recommendations.overview: A maverick skydiver and a former KGB agent team up to stop the Russian mafia from stealing gold.

recommendations.title: To Live and Die in L.A.
recommendations.overview: When his longtime partner on the force is killed, reckless U.S. Secret Service agent Richard Chance vows revenge, setting out to nab dangerous counterfeit artist Eric Masters.

recommendations.title: Death Whisperer 2
recommendations.overview: Three years after his sister's death, Yak relentlessly searches for the dark spirit that killed her in hopes of seeking revenge.

recommendations.title: The Courier
recommendations.overview: Cold War spy Greville Wynne and his Russian source try to put an end to the Cuban Missile Crisis.

recommendations.title: Eastern Promises
recommendations.overview: A Russian teenager living in London dies during childbirth but leaves clues in her diary that could tie her child to a rape involving a violent Russian mob family.

recommendations.title: Mother's Day
recommendations.overview: Nina, a former NATO special operations agent living in hiding, has to use all her deadly skills to rescue her son who has been kidnapped by ruthless gangsters. Finding Max is a double opportunity for her. A chance to feel the adrenaline rush again, a

recommendations.title: Möbius
recommendations.overview: An FSB officer falls in love with his agent, an American woman who works as a trader in a Russian bank.

recommendations.title: The Machine Girl
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Crime, Horror, Thriller
recommendations.overview: The life of a young, Japanese schoolgirl is destroyed when her family is killed by a Ninja-Yakuza family. Her hand cut off, she replaces it with various machines-of-death, and seeks revenge.
